content.p: Any person who willfully performs any act prohibited, or willfully fails to perform any act required, by the provisions of this subchapter or any rule, regulation, or order thereunder, shall, upon conviction, be fined not more than $10,000 or imprisoned for not more than one year, or both.

note.heading: Termination of Section
note.p: For termination of section, see section 4564(a) of this title.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 2073 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
